title: F# Cheat Sheet
description: Essential F# syntax and commands for software engineers.

commands.command: let add x y = x + y
commands.description: Define a simple function that adds two numbers
commands.scenario: Define a simple function that adds two numbers

commands.description: Create a list of integers from 1 to 5
commands.scenario: Create a list of integers from 1 to 5

commands.command: type Person = { Name: string; Age: int }
commands.description: Define a record type for a person
commands.scenario: Define a record type for a person

commands.description: Create a tuple with mixed types
commands.scenario: Create a tuple with mixed types

commands.command: type Shape = | Circle of float | Rectangle of float * float
commands.description: Use a discriminated union for shape types
commands.scenario: Use a discriminated union for shape types

commands.command: let checkNumber x = if x > 0 then "Positive" else "Non-positive"
for i in 1 .. 5 do printfn "%d" i
commands.description: For loop to iterate over a range
commands.scenario: For loop to iterate over a range

commands.command:
let mutable sum = 0
let mutable i = 1
while i <= 5 do
    sum <- sum + i
    i <- i + 1
commands.description: While loop to sum numbers until a condition is met
commands.scenario: While loop to sum numbers until a condition is met

commands.command: let squares = List.map (fun x -> x * x) [1; 2; 3]
commands.description: Map a function over a list
commands.scenario: Map a function over a list

commands.description: Filter a list for even numbers
commands.scenario: Filter a list for even numbers

commands.command: let sum = List.fold (fun acc x -> acc + x) 0 [1; 2; 3]
commands.description: Fold a list to compute the sum
commands.scenario: Fold a list to compute the sum

commands.command:
module Math =
    let square x = x * x
commands.description: Define a module with a function
commands.scenario: Define a module with a function

commands.description: Open a namespace to use its members
commands.scenario: Open a namespace to use its members

commands.description: Use a qualified name from a module
